action.reasoning: Observation: 8 new models (10-17) trained with val AUCs 0.7445-0.7492. Now have 18 total ensemble models. Previous 10-model ensemble got test AUC 0.7511. Adding more diverse models should help even if individual scores are slightly lower. Remaining time ~8.9 min. Analysis: Submit eval immediately with full 18-model ensemble. predict.py already loads all model_*.pt files with weighted averaging, so new models are automatically included. Decision: Submit eval now, then potentially train a couple more targeted models if time allows.
